human_verification.notes: Reviewed the package for funeral, cemetery, crematory, hydrolysis, preneed, vital-record, Funeral Rule, exposure-control, evidence, functionality coverage, and validated spec-pack completeness.

specialist_owned_evidence: Boundary is explicit to funeral compliance support for Funeral Rule disclosures, price lists, selected-services statements, retention, death-registration dependencies, disposition permits, cemetery and crematory requirements, preneed records, complaint evidence, and exposure-control records rather than generic compliance.

Authority sources cover primary eCFR Funeral Rule text, official FTC Funeral Rule guidance, CDC/NCHS death-registration workflow, California funeral and cemetery regulator guidance, VA national cemetery committal guidance, and OSHA bloodborne-pathogen standards and funeral-home interpretation.

Evaluation scenarios cover normal in-scope work, missing evidence, disposition and vital-record prerequisites, conflicting policy or regulator sources, legal and regulator-facing refusal, operational practice conflicts, anti-generic industry handling, licensed body-preparation boundaries, cemetery or crematory conflicts, preneed financial boundaries, low-confidence handling, tenant-specific controls, and veterans cemetery committal boundaries.

The package is organized under catalog/naics-overlays/funeral-cemetery-and-end-of-life-services/funeral-compliance-specialist/ and remains distinct from arrangement conference, funeral home operations, cemetery administration, crematory operations, documentation, preneed, family care, billing, benefits, legal, safety, privacy, and records lanes.

review_notes: No unreviewed regressions were identified in the local package review.
Functionality coverage is complete in both evaluation/results.json and readiness/evidence.json as required by the issue.
No blocking unresolved ambiguity remains; jurisdiction and tenant variance is handled through runtime prerequisites, escalation, and refusal rules.

notes: This package is suitable as a validated funeral compliance specialist for evidence-backed obligation review, compliance gap handling, control monitoring, exception escalation, and review preparation in funeral, cemetery, crematory, and end-of-life service settings.
Runtime remains specification-based until a retained implementation is promoted separately.
